case_title: MARSHA LEE JONES VS. CRISTINA CAMPOS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, MARSHA LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, CRISTINA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, PAIN AND SUFFERING DAMAGES. NO AMOUNT IS AWARDED FOR PAST MEDICAL EXPENSES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE ON GREEN CARD) SERVED NOV-30-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, CRISTINA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY JONES, MARSHA LEE CAMPOS, CRISTINA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JONES, MARSHA LEE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, CRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, MARSHA LEE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, CRISTINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN 506. PLAINTIFF MARSHA LEE JONES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRISTINA CAMPOS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
